description: Kasius, delighted at Simmons’s progress and appearance, announces she will soon be shown off to his guests. With Simmons now fully under Kasius’s control, the stage is set for further conflict and her fate remains uncertain. The episode closes with a note of suspense and dread.

transcript.line: Jemma. You look wonderful. And I hear you're learning well. That's good. Just in time for my guests.
